zh.lifeSummary: 當Amphilicia Neville於大約1460年出生在英國林可爾史爾朗 塞頓時，她的父親John Neville24歲，母親Anne Mablethorpe22歲。她於大約1485年與John Newdegate在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾哈雷斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1544年7月15日在英國米德萊可哈利費爾德享年85歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可哈利費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Amphilicia Neville于大约1460年出生在英国林可爾史爾朗 塞頓时，她的父亲John Neville24岁，母亲Anne Mablethorpe22岁。她于大约1485年与John Newdegate在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾哈雷斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1544年7月15日在英国米德萊可哈利費爾德享年85岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可哈利費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

en.lifeSummary: When Amphilicia Neville was born about 1460, in Long Sutton, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John Neville, was 24 and her mother, Anne Mablethorpe, was 22. She married John Newdegate about 1485, in Haresfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 15 July 1544, in Harefield, Middlesex, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in Harefield, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amphilicia Neville est née environ 1460, à Long Sutton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Neville, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Anne Mablethorpe, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé John Newdegate environ 1485, à Haresfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 juillet 1544, à Harefield, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Harefield, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amphilicia Neville um 1460 in Long Sutton, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Neville 24 und ihre Mutter Anne Mablethorpe 22. Sie hat um 1485 in Haresfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom John Newdegate geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. Juli 1544 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Harefield, Middlesex, England und wurde in Harefield, Middlesex, England begraben.

Lei sposato John Newdegate circa 1485, nel Haresfield, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 15 luglio 1544, nel Harefield, Middlesex, England, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Harefield, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Amphilicia Nevilleが約1460年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアロング スットオンで生まれた時，父John Nevilleは24歳，母Anne Mablethorpeは22歳であった。約1485年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアハーエスフィールドでJohn Newdegateと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1544年7月15日にイギリスミッドレセックスハーエフィールドで85歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスハーエフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Amphilicia Neville(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 링코실르 론그 수턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Neville(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Mablethorpe(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 하레스필드에서 John Newdegate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1544년 7월 15일 영국 미들레세스 하레필드에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 하레필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Amphilicia Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Long Sutton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Neville, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Anne Mablethorpe, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com John Newdegate aproximadamente 1485, em Haresfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de julho de 1544, em Harefield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Harefield, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ro.of Long Sutton, Lincolnshire, England: Long Sutton, Lincolnshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amphilicia Neville родилась около 1460 г. в местности лонг суттон, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Neville было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Mablethorpe, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Newdegate около 1485 г. в местности харесфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 15 июля 1544 г. в местности харефиелд, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности харефиелд, миддлесекс, Англия.

Se casó con John Newdegate aproximadamente 1485, en Haresfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 15 de julio de 1544, en Harefield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Harefield, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
